Manish Agarwal · Revenue and Operating Executive

A 51 second note for CoreWeave

Recorded for the Vice President, Americas Sales search. Press play.
Hi, I'm Manish Agarwal. You're hiring a Vice President for Americas Sales because CoreWeave needs to change the slope of its growth curve, and you want an operator who owns the whole engine, GTM through P&L. I took Cadient's EBITDA from 12 to 25 percent in nine months. Here is how I would go about it. In the first thirty days, spend time in the pipeline data and on live calls with the team. By ninety days, help the team land a steeper, margin-positive conversion curve on a measurable early cohort. If that maps to what you're working on, I would enjoy comparing notes on how I would approach the first ninety days. Thanks for listening.
